description: Reboot the ElastiCache primary node by CacheClusterId to test connection pool resilience and cache warming behavior

rebootPrimaryNode.description: Reboot the specified ElastiCache primary node and wait for recovery

parameters.documentParameters: {"CacheClusterId": "<YOUR CACHE CLUSTER ID>", "AutomationAssumeRole": "arn:aws:iam::<YOUR AWS ACCOUNT>:role/<YOUR SSM ROLE NAME>"}
